Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Genuineness Of Documents To Be Admited And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Christopher Cole, for Plaintiff/Moving Party
Michael Blacksburg, for Defendant/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion For Order Deeming Genuiness of Documents To Be Admitted is moot as Defendant has made a verified response. The late verification was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount $636.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
